context.interpretation: Procore data layer is a cross-cutting platform/data-layer workstream, not a standalone PCC workflow module.
currentRepoTruthToVerify: Wave 13 Buyout Log model contracts may have landed.
Wave 13 Buyout Log backend GET-only mock read-model route may have landed.
SPFx/runtime status must be audited by the executing agent before changes.

nonNegotiableGuardrails: No live Procore runtime unless a later prompt explicitly authorizes a non-production live-read proof.
No Procore secrets in docs, schema, fixtures, repo source, SharePoint, or SPFx surfaces.
No SDK dependency adoption unless a later proof-gated implementation prompt explicitly authorizes it.
No package.json or pnpm-lock.yaml changes unless specifically authorized by the prompt and justified by validation.

waveOverlay.name: Procore Data Layer Remediation Gate
waveOverlay.purpose: Audit Waves 1-13 against Procore data-layer doctrine and create a remediation scope lock.

waveOverlay.name: HB Central Projects Registry + Procore Mapping Contract
waveOverlay.purpose: Define canonical project-to-Procore mapping using HB Central Projects as registry context, without overloading Projects.procoreProject.

waveOverlay.name: Shared Procore Data Layer Models and Fixtures
waveOverlay.purpose: Add shared TypeScript contracts and deterministic fixtures for object links, curated summaries, sync health, source lineage, derived signals, and freshness bands.

waveOverlay.name: Backend Mock Adapter Boundary
waveOverlay.purpose: Introduce backend Procore data-layer provider interfaces and mock-only read-model boundaries with no external calls.
primaryOutputs: GET-only PCC read-model route(s) if needed
runtime guard tests proving no Procore I/O

waveOverlay.name: SPFx Fixture Integration Into Core Surfaces
waveOverlay.purpose: Wire Procore-derived fixture signals into Project Home, Priority Actions, Project Readiness, External Systems, and Site Health surfaces through existing read-model seams.

waveOverlay.name: Module Remediation and Closeout
waveOverlay.purpose: Patch existing module docs/surfaces/tests for Procore source-lineage posture and close the remediation wave.

firstLiveReadGate.name: Controlled non-production Procore live-read proof
firstLiveReadGate.scope: One company, one project, read-only; mapping, directory, RFIs, submittals, observations, punch, daily-log summaries, drawing/spec metadata only.
